      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AMBIENCE_LIGHT_INTENSITY
      Custom Ambient Light Intensity, original ID is SETTING_FUNC_AMBIENCE_LIGHT_INTENSITY_SET 自定义氛围灯亮度，原 ID 为 SETTING_FUNC_AMBIENCE_LIGHT_INTENSITY_SET ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type value : 0 ~ 100 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-25 10:35:14
